prospects world where they are if you want to move someone to some other state whether it's from anger to being calm whether it's from uncertainty to certainty whether it's from hatred to love lack of compassion to compassion you enter their world where they are and then you pace them and then you pace them and then you lead them where you want them to go here's what I mean I walked down says my car what's going on with this kid he was this kid I said that kid again I swear to god I'm gonna kill that kid I'm gonna call his father I'm gonna get that kid thrown off I'm sick of hearing this god just pisses me off so much what are we gonna do with this kid he goes I don't know oh my god I must feel really bad get it you know what percentage of the time that works like 99.9 with human beings you enter there which then you got to do it ninja it's pace pace lead not pace pace lead you got to do it right you got to enter their world where they are and then you pace them and then you pace them and then you lead them where you want to go now what does that mean for selling well here's where it gets scary because if I say to somebody I hear what you're saying Bill but let me ask you a
